description: Developer-first, Linear-style project management tool. High performance, zero fluff, dense typography, stark contrasts.

guidelines: Headings should use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Task IDs and tags MUST use IBM Plex Mono.
Import IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono from Google Fonts or @fontsource.

layout.spacing: Generous on marketing (p-8 to p-24), dense and functional in app (p-2 to p-6).
layout.corners: Minimal rounding (rounded-md or rounded-sm). Sharp edges preferred.
layout.borders: 1px solid borders for structure. The 'Technical' Look (Grid Borders).
layout.kanban: Columns should stretch horizontally. Use CSS grid or flex. Task cards are flat with subtle borders, no large shadows.
layout.marketing_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris' Grid for the 3-feature grid section.

components.sidebar: Dark background. Active states have a subtle white background with 10% opacity.
components.task_card: Flat white background, 1px border. Flex layout for top row (ID, assignee), middle row (Title), bottom row (Tags, Priority).
components.slide_over: Fixed right panel with 1px left border and subtle shadow. Contains rich text and comments. Use Framer Motion to slide in.
components.marketing_hero: Dark mode. Massive H1. Pill badge on top. Floating product screenshot.

animations.hover: Subtle background color changes and slight border darkening. NO bouncy animations.
animations.slide_over: Framer motion right-to-left slide in. Backdrop uses glassmorphism.

marketing_hero_bg.description: Dark abstract technology background for hero section

marketing_product_mockup.description: Laptop screen with code, representing the app dashboard in the marketing page

avatar_1.description: Assignee avatar - Man wearing henley top

avatar_2.description: Assignee avatar - Woman with long hair

avatar_3.description: Assignee avatar - Woman in gray and black scarf

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor icons for a highly technical, precision feel matching dense dashboards.
Build the UI focusing on high density and technical precision.
In the Marketing Page, use dark mode strictly. Hero should have a large 'ruthless efficiency' headline with a blue accent.
For the App Shell, implement a dark sidebar (w/ workspace branding) and a light canvas for the Kanban board.
Kanban board uses dot+count headers for columns. Cards should look flat with sharp borders.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g. data-testid='new-issue-button').
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing page layout; Shadcn for complex internal dashboard elements like modals/dropdowns.
Ensure the slide-over task panel has a backdrop-blur.
